note: Compound governance token. COVER = delegate/delegateBySig (voting-power delegation = a permission-delegation primitive, Airdrop::Delegate). transfer/transferFrom/approve are standard ERC-20 (COMP base+governance token) -> erc20 standard adapter.

0x5c19a95c.name: delegate
0x5c19a95c.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: delegate COMP voting power to a delegatee (Airdrop::Delegate)

0xc3cda520.name: delegateBySig
0xc3cda520.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: EIP-712 gasless voting-power delegation (Airdrop::Delegate; on-chain submission + off-chain Delegation sig)

Delegation.reason: off-chain EIP-712 message a user signs for delegateBySig; delegates COMP voting power (Airdrop::Delegate typed-data)
